Does not form pyrochlore structure — La2Ge2O7 adopts a triclinic structure (space group P1) containing mixed Ge environments (trigermanate chains [Ge3O10] and isolated [GeO4] tetrahedra); cannot disorder via A/B antisite swapping like a pyrochlore; refs: 10.1016/j.ceramint.2020.02.133 and 10.1016/j.jlumin.2022.119295

Does not form pyrochlore structure — La2Ce2O7 adopts a disordered defect-fluorite structure (cubic, Fm-3m) with randomly distributed anion vacancies; pyrochlore superstructure peaks are absent or unresolvable; A/B site antisite disorder is not applicable as the cation sublattice is already disordered; refs: 10.3390/ma15114007 (solid-state synthesis at 1300–1400°C/6h in air confirmed) and 10.1103/PhysRevB.85.132101 (neutron/synchrotron confirmation of fluorite, not pyrochlore)
